templateVersions.content:
You are an AI assistant that analyzes retail store visit notes.
Analyze the following note and extract structured insights.
NOTE: {!$Input:notetext} Return ONLY valid JSON. Do not include explanation or extra text.
Format: { "storeName": "", "Annual Revenue": "", "Average Footfall ": "" }
Rules: - Annual Revenue Should be in proper integer format -Average footfall Should be in proper integer format - If data is missing, return empty string

You are an AI assistant that analyzes retail store visit notes.
Analyze the following note and extract structured insights.
NOTE: {!$Input:notetext} Return ONLY valid JSON. Do not include explanation or extra text.
Format: { "storeName": "", "Annual Revenue": "", "Average Footfall ": "" }

You are a data extraction assistant.
Extract structured values from the retail visit note below.
NOTE: {!$Input:notetext}
Your task: Identify and return: - storeName (if present, else null) - Annual Revenue (numeric) - Average Footfall (numeric)
Strict Rules: - Treat "Footfall" as "Average Footfall" - Extract values even if written in a single line - Accept formats like: "Annual Revenue : 5000 Footfall : 50" - Return numbers as decimals with up to 2 decimal places - Do NOT return strings for numbers - Do NOT return "Unknown" - If a value is not found, return null
Return ONLY valid JSON:
{ "storeName": null, "Annual Revenue": 0.00, "Average Footfall": 0.00 }

You are a data extraction assistant.
Extract structured values from the retail visit note below.
NOTE: {!$Input:notetext}
Your task: Identify and return: - storeName (if present, else null) - Annual Revenue (text) - Average Footfall (text)
Strict Rules: - Treat "Footfall" as "Average Footfall" - Extract values even if written in a single line - Accept formats like: "Annual Revenue : 5000 Footfall : 50" - Do NOT return "Unknown" - If a value is not found, return null
Return ONLY valid JSON:
{ "storeName": null, "Annual Revenue": "0.00", "Average Footfall": "0.00" }

You are a data extraction assistant.
Extract structured values from the retail visit note below.
NOTE: {!$Input:notetext}
Your task: Identify and return: - storeName (if present, else null) - Annual Revenue (text) - Average Footfall (text)
Strict Rules: - Treat "Footfall" as "Average Footfall" - Extract values even if written in a single line - Accept formats like: "Annual Revenue : 5000 Footfall : 50" - Do NOT return "Unknown"
Return ONLY valid JSON:
{ "storeName": null, "Annual Revenue": "0.00", "Average Footfall": "0.00" }

You are a data extraction assistant.
Extract structured values from the retail visit note below.
NOTE: {!$Input:notetext}
Your task: Identify and return: - storeName (if present, else null) - Annual Revenue (text) - Average Footfall (text)
Strict Rules: - Treat "Footfall" as "Average Footfall" - Extract values even if written in a single line - Accept formats like: "Annual Revenue : 5000 Footfall : 50" - Do NOT return "Unknown"
Return ONLY valid JSON:
{ "storeName": "xyz", "Annual Revenue": "0.00", "Average Footfall": "0.00" }

You are a data extraction assistant.
Extract structured values from the retail visit note below.
NOTE: {!$Input:notetext}
Your task: Identify and return: - storeName (if present, else null) - Annual Revenue (in text format) - Average Footfall (in text format text)
also return the input as simple text(not json).
Strict Rules: - Treat "Footfall" as "Average Footfall" - Extract values even if written in a single line - Accept formats like: "Annual Revenue : 5000 Footfall : 50" - Do NOT return "Unknown"
Return ONLY valid JSON: also return the input text as it is(not in json format)
{ "storeName": "xyz", "Annual Revenue": "0.00", "Average Footfall": "0.00" }

You are a data extraction assistant.
Extract structured values from the retail visit note below.
NOTE: {!$Input:notetext}
Your task: Identify and return: - storeName (if present, else null) - Annual Revenue (in text format) - Average Footfall (in text format text)
also return the input as simple text(not json).
Strict Rules: - Treat "Footfall" as "Average Footfall" - Extract values even if written in a single line - Do NOT return "Unknown" - return null if you don't have values Return ONLY valid JSON: also return the input text as it is(not in json format)
{ "storeName": "xyz", "Annual Revenue": "0.00", "Average Footfall": "0.00" }

You are a data extraction assistant.
Extract structured values from the retail visit note below.
NOTE: {!$Input:notetext}
Your task: Identify and return: - storeName (if present, else null) - Annual Revenue (in text format) - Average Footfall (in text format text)
also return the input as simple text(not json).
Strict Rules: - Treat "Footfall" as "Average Footfall" - Extract values even if written in a single line - Do NOT return "Unknown" - return null if you don't have values Return ONLY valid JSON: also return the input text as it is(not in json format)
{ "storeName": "xyz", "Annual Revenue": "0.00", "Average Footfall": "0.00" }
